cases.prompt: Evaluate the completion and quality of warehouse/local/example-skill as an Agent Skill.
cases.expected_signal: The skill declares that it should be used for auditing, evaluating, improving Agent Skills, generating eval plans, and stress-testing skill behavior.

assertions.name: description-covers-skill-audit
assertions.expect: Audit, evaluate, and improve Agent Skills|generate eval plans|stress-test skill behavior
assertions.criteria: Frontmatter description must preserve positive trigger language for Agent Skill audit and eval work.

cases.notes: Deterministic proxy for positive trigger coverage.

cases.prompt: Optimize this marketing prompt for a product landing page.
cases.expected_signal: The skill excludes ordinary prompt optimization unless the target artifact is an Agent Skill.

assertions.name: description-excludes-prompt-optimizer
assertions.expect: Do not use for ordinary prompt optimization
assertions.criteria: Frontmatter description must prevent adjacent confusion with prompt optimization.

cases.prompt: Decide whether a skill should exist before optimizing it.
cases.expected_signal: The skill has an explicit Necessity Gate reference and rule to stop deep optimization without demonstrated behavioral increment.

assertions.name: necessity-reference-exists
assertions.criteria: Necessity Gate must remain a separately loadable reference.

assertions.name: necessity-rule-present
assertions.expect: Does this skill create a measurable behavioral increment|If no, do not deepen the skill
assertions.criteria: Reference must retain the keep/delete decision principle.

cases.notes: Covers Phase -1 from the design notes.

cases.prompt: Audit multiple skills with different purposes and choose different optimization metrics.
cases.expected_signal: The skill retains the intent taxonomy with all primary categories and maps meta-optimizer failures to intent accuracy, eval fit, and gate quality.

assertions.name: intent-taxonomy-exists
assertions.criteria: Intent taxonomy must remain separately loadable.

assertions.name: intent-categories-present
assertions.criteria: The taxonomy must preserve the main intent classes.

cases.notes: Protects intent-specific evaluation rather than one generic rubric.

cases.prompt: Improve a narrow skill without making it a heavy self-training framework.
cases.expected_signal: The skill keeps the minimum sufficient mechanism rule and no-self-training-without-evals boundary.

assertions.name: anti-overfitting-exists
assertions.criteria: Anti-overfitting reference must remain separately loadable.

assertions.name: minimum-mechanism-present
assertions.expect: Use the minimum sufficient mechanism|No Self-Training Without Evals|description -> gotcha -> output contract -> reference index -> script -> self-training
assertions.criteria: Reference must preserve the lightweight-first escalation policy.

cases.notes: Prevents optimizer from template-overfitting target skills.

cases.prompt: Initialize protected self-training workspace for a skill.
cases.expected_signal: The skill describes source/original, source/working, eval splits, runs, checkpoints, logs, restore backups, and reports.

assertions.name: runtime-workspace-exists
assertions.criteria: Runtime workspace protocol must remain separately loadable.

assertions.name: workspace-layout-present
assertions.criteria: Workspace reference must preserve isolated mutation and rollback layout.

cases.notes: Covers the isolation requirement for self-training.

cases.prompt: Decide whether to keep or discard a mutation after eval traces exist.
cases.expected_signal: The skill retains AND gate dimensions, pending assertion handling, trace schema, and gate outcomes.

assertions.name: logging-gate-exists
assertions.criteria: Logging and gate protocol must remain separately loadable.

assertions.name: and-gate-present
assertions.criteria: Gate protocol must preserve AND gate dimensions and pending review outcome.

cases.prompt: Choose a safe mutation layer after observing a target skill failure.
cases.expected_signal: The skill preserves frontmatter, SKILL.md, resources, scripts, and evals as separate mutation layers with evidence-backed atomicity.

assertions.name: mutation-policy-exists
assertions.criteria: Mutation policy must remain separately loadable.

assertions.name: mutation-layers-present
assertions.expect: Frontmatter|SKILL.md|Resources|Scripts|Evals|Each mutation must name the target intent
assertions.criteria: Mutation policy must preserve layer separation and evidence requirement.

cases.prompt: Run deterministic eval assertions and write traces.
cases.expected_signal: run-evals.ts supports deterministic assertions and trace output.

assertions.name: runner-exists
assertions.criteria: Eval runner must be executable by Bun.

assertions.name: runner-methods-present
assertions.criteria: Runner must keep deterministic methods and trace writing.

cases.notes: Raises readiness from pure protocol to runnable deterministic checks.

cases.prompt: Create a workspace from a skill that already has evals/evals.json.
cases.expected_signal: workspace-init.ts prefers existing eval suites and writes eval split files plus evolve-plan.md.

assertions.name: workspace-init-exists
assertions.criteria: Workspace initializer must be executable by Bun.

assertions.name: workspace-init-capability-present
assertions.criteria: Workspace initializer must preserve existing evals and produce split suites/report.

cases.notes: Protects against replacing reviewed evals with generated placeholders.

cases.prompt: Checkpoint a working copy, gate eval traces, and restore after discard.
cases.expected_signal: The skill bundles checkpoint, gate, and restore scripts.

assertions.name: checkpoint-script
assertions.criteria: Checkpoint script must exist and be executable by Bun.

assertions.name: gate-script
assertions.criteria: Gate script must exist and be executable by Bun.

assertions.name: restore-script
assertions.criteria: Restore script must exist and be executable by Bun.

cases.prompt: Finish a skill audit or an iterative optimization run.
cases.expected_signal: The skill includes audit, eval, patch, and final report deliverable contracts plus templates.

assertions.name: report-templates-exist
assertions.criteria: Templates must remain discoverable for formal deliverables.

assertions.name: delivery-contract-present
assertions.expect: Purpose and intent diagnosis|Necessity judgment|Top findings with evidence|Eval plan|Recommended mutation strategy
assertions.criteria: SKILL.md must preserve concise audit package output contract.

cases.notes: Holdout-style structural guard for final response quality.

cases.prompt: Audit routing, tool-script, and workflow/knowledge fixture skills.
cases.expected_signal: The optimizer diagnoses distinct primary intents, mutation layers, and eval plan types for representative fixture skills.

assertions.name: fixture-script-exists
assertions.criteria: Fixture behavior check must be executable by Bun.

assertions.name: fixture-assets-present
assertions.criteria: Fixture skills must exist and be included in the regression suite.

cases.notes: Behavior-level proxy: verified by scripts/check-fixtures.ts, which invokes audit-skill against real fixture skills.

cases.prompt: Run behavior-level external_judgment or human_preference evals with external reviewer evidence.
cases.expected_signal: run-evals.ts accepts --judgments-file and maps case/assertion judgments into trace evidence.

assertions.name: judgment-runner-contract
assertions.criteria: Runner must preserve the external judgment injection path.

assertions.name: schema-documents-judgments
assertions.criteria: Eval schema must document external judgment files.

cases.notes: Covers the LLM/human review bridge without requiring network access.

cases.prompt: Gate a non-baseline iteration against baseline pass rate.
cases.expected_signal: gate.ts reads runs/baseline, compares primary metric, and records delta evidence.

assertions.name: gate-delta-code
assertions.criteria: Gate must compare current run against baseline instead of only checking absolute pass/fail.

assertions.name: gate-delta-doc
assertions.expect: primary_metric baseline=|current=|delta=|does not regress against baseline
assertions.criteria: Gate documentation must describe metric delta behavior.

cases.prompt: Run iterate on a workspace dev suite where the working skill should pass.
cases.expected_signal: iterate.ts passes --target-skill-dir=<workspace>/source/working to run-evals and preserves the success path.

assertions.name: iterate-target-skill-dir
assertions.criteria: iterate.ts must evaluate source/working and still support judgment files and restore-on-discard.

cases.notes: Regression for the bug found by independent reviewer B.

cases.prompt: Generate a mutation proposal from a failed or pending trace without editing files.
cases.expected_signal: The optimizer provides a trace-backed proposal script and documents that proposals are not automatic patches.

assertions.name: proposal-script-exists
assertions.criteria: Mutation proposal script must be executable by Bun.

assertions.name: proposal-contract-present
assertions.criteria: Proposal output must follow the ideation contract.

cases.notes: Adds executable trace-driven ideation without automatic risky edits.

cases.prompt: Optimize a skill description so it triggers on relevant user requests and stays silent on adjacent out-of-scope requests.
cases.expected_signal: The optimizer routes frontmatter trigger work to the description trigger harness and preserves dev/holdout repeated-run gating.

assertions.name: harness-reference-exists
assertions.criteria: Description trigger tuning must have a separately loadable reference.

assertions.name: harness-contract-present
assertions.expect: should-trigger|should-not-trigger|adjacent-confusion|dev|holdout|repeats|Failure Packet|description-only mutations|scripts/description-harness.ts|false positives|false negatives|temporary project|fake skill|claude -p|Previous descriptions|Full SKILL.md
assertions.criteria: Harness must preserve trigger case taxonomy, split protocol, repeated-run evidence, and description mutation boundary.

assertions.name: harness-script-exists
assertions.criteria: Description harness must have deterministic scoring support.

cases.notes: Regression for the user-supplied harness engineering reference on description optimization.
